title: Current multi-token morphology queries still rank the on-topic fact first
description: Exercises the Risk B install/installing and backup/backups families with today’s shipped ordering: when a second anchor token is present, the on-topic fact still ranks ahead of the unrelated distractor even though single-token stemming is still absent.
contract_notes: This M1 baseline stays green on the current system while covering the morphology families called out in Risk B. M4 should tighten these into explicit stemming expectations once porter-backed search lands.

facts.content: Use pnpm for installing dependencies in this monorepo
Always back up the database nightly before deploy
Database backups run via pg_dump every night
Acme primary database runs on Postgres
